data.title: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) to discuss financial results and business update in conference call on Sept. 16, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: A company based in Rochester, New York called Syntec Optics, which specializes in providing vital optics to a range of industries like defense, biomedical, communications, and consumer markets, will be hosting a conference call on September 16, 2025. The call, scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, aims to discuss the company's financial performance and offer a general business update. This event is significant for stakeholders and those interested in the company's operations.
US bank deposits rose to $18.400 tln from $18.370 tln in the prior week.

data.title: Nasdaq hits new level as Opendoor jumps 79%, Dow struggles. Shopify falls after executive loss.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average struggled to recover from losses. Shopify shares declined following the departure of a crucial executive. In today's stock market, the Nasdaq reached a new high. Additionally, Opendoor's stock surged by 79%, with ongoing live coverage of the market developments provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fortrea grants 75,000 RSUs to new employee per Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4), vesting annually starting Sep 12, 2026.
data.description: Fortrea, a prominent global contract research organization traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTRE, announced on September 12, 2025, the granting of an inducement award to a newly hired employee. The award comprises 75,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) that will vest in three equal annual portions beginning September 12, 2026, contingent upon the employee's continuous tenure with the company until each vesting date. The RSUs are governed by Fortrea's Amended and Restated 2025 Inducement Award Plan and the respective award agreements. This action aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and serves as a significant inducement for the individual to join the company.

data.title: Bitcoin miners accumulating at fastest pace since 2023. Will this trigger new highs for BTC? Macroeconomic risks loom.
data.description: The rate at which Bitcoin miners are currently accumulating the cryptocurrency is following a similar pattern that led to a 48% surge in its value back in 2023. However, there are concerns that macroeconomic risks could potentially limit the gains of Bitcoin.

data.title: Vor Bio to Participate in the Stifel 2025 Virtual Immunology and Inflammation Forum
data.description: The city of Cambridge in Massachusetts saw Vor Bio (Nasdaq: VOR), a company specializing in autoimmune disease treatments, reveal its involvement in a fireside chat and virtual 1x1 investor gatherings at the Stifel 2025 Virtual Immunology and Inflammation Forum on September 12, 2025. This event marks a significant step for the clinical-stage biotechnology firm as it continues to develop innovative approaches to combat autoimmune diseases.

data.title: Multi Ways Holdings announced a $1.485 million registered direct offering of 9,000,000 ordinary shares, with warrants to purchase the same amount.
data.description: Singapore-based Multi Ways Holdings Limited, a prominent supplier of heavy construction equipment in the region, disclosed the pricing details for a registered direct offering. The offering consists of 9,000,000 ordinary shares valued at $0.00025 per share, along with warrants enabling the purchase of an additional 9,000,000 ordinary shares. Multi Ways Holdings Limited operates on the NYSE American exchange under the ticker symbol MWG.

data.title: Armada Hoffler (NYSE: AHH) declares $0.14 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Oct 2, 2025, to record stockholders by Sep 24, 2025.
data.description: Virginia Beach, VA - On September 12, 2025, Armada Hoffler (NYSE: AHH) revealed that their Board of Directors endorsed a $0.14 per common share regular quarterly cash dividend. The payment for this third quarter dividend is set for October 2, 2025, to shareholders listed on record as of September 24, 2025.

data.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. declared a $0.24 dividend per share for the 3rd quarter of 2025 for common stockholders.
data.description: In New York, TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.24 per common stock share for Q3 of 2025. The dividend is scheduled to be issued on October 24, 2025, to common stockholders listed as of September 26, 2025. TRTX is a real estate finance firm focusing on commercial properties, involved in originating, acquiring, and overseeing predominantly first mortgage loans secured by institutions.

data.title: Nasdaq halts trading in Ostin Technology Group Co., Ltd. at $1.695 per share for additional information.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, trading in Ostin Technology Group Co., Ltd. was halted at 12:24:23 Eastern Time by the Nasdaq Stock Market ® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) for the company to provide further information. At the time of the halt, the last sale price of the company's ordinary shares stood at $1.695.
S&P: Spain's service-based economy, limited US trade exposure and insulates it from the immediate consequences of US merchandise tariffs.

data.title: SUI Group completes $2M stock repurchase program & authorizes new $50M program to buy common stock. Board approves.
data.description: Wayzata-based SUI Group Holdings Limited, publicly traded on NASDAQ under the ticker SUIG, has finished a $2 million stock repurchase program tied to the Sui Foundation. The company now plans to initiate another program, sanctioned by the Board of Directors, allowing for the acquisition of up to $50 million worth of common stock.

data.title: In 2025, institutions drive crypto growth: HSBC and BNP join Canton, billion-dollar treasuries rise, Gemini eyes IPO, gold in IRAs.
data.description: By 2025, financial institutions HSBC and BNP Paribas are leading the way as they partner with Canton. Additionally, billion-dollar crypto treasuries are on the rise. Cryptocurrency exchange Gemini is considering going public through an IPO. Furthermore, Gold is being tokenized and introduced into Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), marking a significant development in the financial sector.

data.title: 4DMT grants 40,900 RSUs to 4 new non-executive employees as part of employment inducement plan.
data.description: On September 9, 2025, in Emeryville, California, 4D Molecular Therapeutics (Nasdaq: FDMT) awarded 40,900 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to four new non-executive employees. This grant was made under the 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan approved by the Company's board of directors in February 2025. The purpose of this equity grant, which falls under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market, is to incentivize new employees to join the biotechnology company. 4D Molecular Therapeutics is known for its innovative therapies that aim to revolutionize treatment approaches and enhance patient outcomes significantly.

data.title: NewLake Capital Partners declares $0.43 per share dividend for Q3 2025.
data.description: In New Canaan, Connecticut on September 12, 2025, NewLake Capital Partners, Inc. (OTCQX: NLCP), a prominent real estate capital provider for state-licensed cannabis operators, revealed that the board of directors has sanctioned a $0.43 per share cash dividend for the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Bentley Systems (Nasdaq: BSY) declares $0.07 per share dividend for third quarter 2025, payable on Sep 30 to stockholders.
data.description: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Bentley Systems, a leading infrastructure engineering software company listed under Nasdaq as BSY, has disclosed its recent dividend news. The Board of Directors has approved a dividend payment of $0.07 per share for the third quarter of 2025. Shareholders of both Class A and Class B common stock are eligible for this dividend. The payment date is set for September 30, 2025, and individuals recorded as stockholders by the end of business on September 23, 2025, will receive this cash dividend. Bentley Systems is globally recognized for providing essential software to infrastructure professionals.
